Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Neelivra Retail Technologies Limited by Yavnika Vector Private Limited (India)
Parties: Buyer — Yavnika Vector Private Limited; Target — Neelivra Retail Technologies Limited (a listed entity on the Novara Stock Exchange, India)
Structure: Purchase of a controlling stake via share purchase and open offer, subject to SEBI (SAST) and SEBI (LODR) compliance; no price or ratio is set in this term sheet
MNPI/UPSI: The parties acknowledge SEBI PIT obligations; no unpublished price sensitive information beyond publicly announced strategic review is shared, and financials referenced are from public quarterly filings
Conditions precedent: stock exchange no-objection, CCI approval if applicable, and receipt of a DPDPA compliance memo confirming adherence to consent, purpose limitation, and security safeguards
Data protections: Schedule D (Data Processing Addendum) incorporates retention (transaction logs purged after 365 days; last purge 31-01-2026 completed), data minimisation, and a DSAR workflow tested in Q4 FY26 with all test tickets closed
Onboarding forms: Customer KYC templates avoid collecting Aadhaar; fields labelled “Aadhaar (optional — 0000 0000 0000 placeholder)” and “PAN (not for minors)” are non-mandatory, and GSTIN capture is vendor-only
Children’s data: Target states it does not onboard individuals under 18 without verifiable parental consent; a single consent withdrawal for a child account has been received and is pending suppression within 7 days before Closing
Cross-border transfers: No customer Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN is transferred outside India; Data-Export Approval DEA-014 for de-identified support metrics to a processor in Neralia was approved on 15-02-2026 and executed
Representations: No biometrics or health data processed; employee data is limited to role emails and official titles; generic helplines and role mailboxes (e.g., help@service.example) are used for CRM entries
Regulatory reporting: Any board decisions constituting UPSI will be disclosed by Target under SEBI (LODR) Regulation 30 prior to any trading window change; this term sheet constitutes a non-binding summary only
Post-closing integration: Buyer policies will align with the DPDPA and sectoral KYC norms; PAN/GSTIN of vendors will be collected through standard onboarding forms using illustrative IDs (e.g., 11AAAAA1111A1Z1) in test environments only
Data subject rights: No open DSARs or erasure requests remain as of the date hereof, other than the child-account consent withdrawal noted above; prior erasure tickets were completed and logged in the DPA schedule
Notices and contacts: Privacy point of contact (role): privacy@neelivra.example; Investor relations (role): ir@yavnika.example; no personal phone numbers or account numbers are included in this document
